content.en:
After a while.

Ye Tian's cultivation was completely stable.

Now, he was already an Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Of course, he is only the Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestor now, and his strength cannot be compared with the Origin Middle Realm and the Upper Realm, and the gap is still very large.

But if it was compared to that group of primeval-level genius-level Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, he would naturally crush them, and his strength would far surpass them.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian replaced the other copied bodies one by one with Origin Realm cultivation.

......

Purple Mist on the other side.

Ye Tian's other replica body was still here, and this duplicate body of his had not been replaced by him for the Origin Realm.

Because once it is replaced by the Origin Realm, it is estimated that it will be excluded.

In case at that time, it is discovered by the people of the Xiao family, the Lord of the Blood Night will definitely appear as soon as possible.

That's when he's in trouble.

As a result, his replica body never left.

But now, he's finally getting his chance.

Many of the Xiao family's bone transformation realms have finally entered this treasure land again, after all, the last time they, the other side level geniuses, killed most of the dangerous creatures in this treasure land, and now the danger is not very great.

And there must be resources in this treasure land that have not been developed, so the Xiao family wants to continue to develop the resources here.

Ye Tian was going to make a copy of the body of the Xiao family, and then leave here as the Xiao family.

In this way, he could quietly bring out treasures such as the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side and a part of the Purple Ruin Gold Liquid on the other side.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian chose a Nine Bone Transformation Realm primordial-level genius, and after the other party left, he began to copy the other party's body.

After some time, the copy came out.

After that, Ye Tian transferred all his resources to this replica body, and then annihilated himself.

"Leave!"

Ye Tian left quickly, without arousing any vigilance and suspicion from the Xiao family.

After all, a lot of Xiao family bones change in and out, which is normal.

After a while, Ye Tian came out of this treasure land.

Subsequently.

He quickly moved away from here, transforming into another replica body, constantly changing identities.

It didn't take long for him to leave the territory of the Xiao family and step into the Origin Black River.

And.

He now carries these resources back with his copy body of the Origin Realm, and he can directly pass through the Innocent Abyss.

Before, his cultivation had not yet reached the Origin Realm, and if he didn't carry that strange leaf through the Innocent Abyss, he would definitely die.

But now, he is naturally not afraid.

"The Insulated Abyss has arrived!"

Without the slightest hesitation, Ye Tian directly entered the Innocent Abyss, and wanted to cross the Innocent Abyss as fast as possible.

Abrupt.

Endless black tentacles were grabbed from the depths of the Innocent Abyss, and the power of each tentacle surpassed that of the other side level geniuses of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm.

"Before, that strange leaf could shield my breath, but now that there is no strange leaf to shield my breath, the creatures in the depths of the Innocent Abyss will come to attack me!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In terms of strength, he was naturally not afraid of the creatures that attacked him this time.

But.

He didn't want to fight him, who knows if there would be even more terrifying creatures here!

"Get out!"

Ye Tian held the Origin Rule Weapon, cast the Endless Golden Arm, and fiercely tore the tentacles one by one, and then left quickly.

Soon.

He passed through the Innocent Abyss and came to the other side of the Origin Black River.

He looked back at the Innocent Abyss and muttered, "When the strength is strong in the future, I will explore here again!"

He felt that the Unsullied Abyss was supposed to contain great secrets, but now was not the time to explore the Unsullied Abyss.

......

Ye Tian's duplicate body did not return to Wind Tooth Island, after all, his other copy body was on Wind Tooth Island.

Thereupon.

He returned to the Seventy-Two Eastern Domains and prepared to cultivate in the territorial sea boundary.

It didn't take long.

He returned to the Seventy-two Eastern Domains, and returned to the boundary rift of territorial waters.

After coming back.

Ye Tian took out the purple ruin crystals on the other side, and he was going to use these purple ruin crystals on the other side to condense an inferior treasure on the other side.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian began to integrate the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side into his own origin, and then used the origin to refine the Purple Ruin Crystal on the other side, and made it into a treasure suitable for him.

Time flies, and one after another piece of purple ruin crystals on the other side were used by Ye Tian.

When all the purple ruin crystals on the other side were used up, Ye Tian's origin gradually gave birth to a treasure on the other side.

But this treasure from the other side is only preliminarily conceived, and it has not yet been completely formed, and it will take a relatively long time before it can be truly conceived.

"Just wait for this treasure from the other side to be slowly conceived!"

Ye Tian took out the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side again, and he made these purple ruin gold liquid on the other side into a small lake, and he soaked in this small lake, absorbing the energy of the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side to strengthen his origin on the other side.

For the Origin Realm, the Origin is cultivation, and strengthening the Origin is equivalent to strengthening the Cultivation.

Under normal circumstances, only by understanding the rules of the other side of the source, and the rules of the other side of the source continue to improve, will the source grow step by step.

But now using the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side, it can also achieve the effect of strengthening the origin, and it is quite good.

Before you know it, more than 3,000 primeval epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally exhausted all the purple ruin gold liquid on the other side, and his cultivation improved a lot.

However, it was not easy for him to judge exactly how far he had reached the Origin Realm now.

But.

Fengya Island has an origin monument, and you can test your own cultivation level.

......

Fengya Island, the origin of the monument.

Ye Tian came here, and then entered his other side origin power to test what cultivation level he had reached.

Rumble!!!

The inscription of the Origin Monument shines brightly, and soon presents a number.

【889】

Seeing this number, he was slightly disappointed.

According to his understanding, if the number of the Origin Monument reaches 1,000, it can be regarded as reaching the middle stage of the Origin Lower Realm, reaching 3,000 is considered to have reached the late stage of the Origin Lower Realm, and reaching 10,000 is the peak of the Origin Lower Realm, and has the qualification to impact the Origin Middle Realm!

In other words, he had refined so much Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side, but he hadn't even reached the middle stage of the Origin Lower Realm.

"It's too difficult for the Origin Realm to elevate your cultivation to the next level!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

It's no wonder that many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Wind Tooth Island are still in the lower realm, and their cultivation is still difficult to improve!

However, he was not too far away from the middle stage of the Origin Lower Realm now, and if he obtained a lot of Purple Ruins Gold Liquid on the other side, he would be able to make a small breakthrough in cultivation. ~
